name: Liu Shan

skills.name: Magnetic Barrier
skills.description: Liu Shan's skills deal equal damage to structures and can disrupt them while also recovering Health.

skills.name: Overcharge!
skills.description: Gains a shield and increased Movement Speed while enhancing the next Basic Attack, dealing damage, and launching the target.

skills.name: Robo Smash
skills.description: Inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Take It for a Spin
skills.description: Launches a spinning attack that continuously deals damage to nearby enemies. While spinning, Basic Attacks slow and deal damage to targets.

tips: Liu Shan is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.6% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Glacial Buckler → Ominous Premonition → Succubus Cloak → Longnight Guardian.
Run Fate for stats that match Liu Shan's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Overcharge! → Robo Smash → Take It for a Spin → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Liu Shan excels into Arthur, Augran, Biron. Avoid blind picking into Li Bai without team peel.

Liu Shan is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.6% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Liu Shan.

faqs.question: Is Liu Shan good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan is Tier A Tank with 49.6% win rate, 0.9% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Shan build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Glacial Buckler, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian. Run Fate arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Shan?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Bai into Liu Shan. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Liu Shan completes core items. Liu Shan struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Liu Shan counter?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan is strong into Arthur, Augran, Biron according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Liu Shan when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Liu Shan good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.6% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Liu Shan.

faqs.question: What lane should Liu Shan play?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Tank). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Liu Shan?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Liu Shan or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Liu Shan vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.7% more often globally. Choose Liu Shan when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Liu Shan?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
